features: 【High Quality】These disposable eyelash brushes are not coarse at all and the bristles are so soft but extremely good for brushing out your eyelashes after they are done. The brush itself is soft yet firm enough to get the job done. The stick is sturdy (not flimsy) and the perfect length (10cm).

【Lots of Disposable Brushes】You will get 100 disposable mascara wands (Brushes will be divided into two plastic bags when 100 pieces, and these two bags are again in a plastic bag.). Very hygienic and plenty of brushes so you don't have to worry about losing your brush.

【Essential Disposable Applicators】These disposable mascara sticks are designed to be used with mascara to smooth your lashes and remove clumps. They glide effortlessly over the lashes, keeping dust and loose lashes out of the eyeball when applied, giving you a perfectly brushed look.

【Professional Mascara Wands】 Good disposable brushes for eyelashes and brows. Keep your mascara application fresh every time. No more clogged mascara brushes and make sure your lashes don't clump. These applicators are perfect for beauty professionals as well as anyone who wants to keep their makeup and tools fresh for optimal application.

【Functional Eyelash Brushes】You can use these brushes to shape your eyebrows but also to apply oil to your eyelashes. They are also good for combing out clumps of mascara or even cleaning small nooks and crannies in kitchen appliances and other household items.
